notes: Run 2026-06-22. Mechanics: Homophones & Soundalikes (5) + Before & After (5). Last pack (2026-06-21) used Anagrams + Hidden Words; choosing Homophones + Before & After to rotate. All homophone pairs are new — none overlap prior packs (active homophones: Knight, Pear, Reign, Sole, Steak, Weak, Flour, Lute, Hare, Bore). All B&A answers are new.
